v2:
SUMMARY:
This PR removes the deprecated `SslBundles` parameter from KafkaProperties builder methods, consolidating SSL bundle handling through `KafkaConnectionDetails`. The core change is sound, but the diff is incomplete — several compilation-breaking updates to callers and the helper class are missing from the provided diff.

POINTS:
- [spring-boot-project/spring-boot-autoconfigure/src/main/java/org/springframework/boot/autoconfigure/kafka/KafkaStreamsAnnotationDrivenConfiguration.java:65] The PR lists this file as changed, but the diff does NOT include the required update from `this.properties.buildStreamsProperties(null)` to `this.properties.buildStreamsProperties()`. Without this change, the project will fail to compile.
- [spring-boot-project/spring-boot-autoconfigure/src/test/java/org/springframework/boot/autoconfigure/kafka/KafkaPropertiesTests.java:109,137,146,155,164] Five test methods still invoke `properties.buildConsumerProperties(new DefaultSslBundleRegistry("myBundle", this.sslBundle))` which will fail to compile after the `buildConsumerProperties(SslBundles)` overload is removed. Tests affected: `sslBundleConfiguration`, `sslPropertiesWhenKeyStoreLocationAndBundleSetShouldThrowException`, `sslPropertiesWhenKeyStoreKeyAndBundleSetShouldThrowException`, `sslPropertiesWhenTrustStoreLocationAndBundleSetShouldThrowException`, `sslPropertiesWhenTrustStoreCertificatesAndBundleSetShouldThrowException`. The PR description claims "The removed test has been restored and updated" but these updates are not reflected in the provided test file content.
- [spring-boot-project/spring-boot-autoconfigure/src/main/java/org/springframework/boot/autoconfigure/kafka/KafkaProperties.java:1797] The private `Properties.with(Ssl ssl, Security security, Map<String, String> properties, SslBundles sslBundles)` method still retains the `SslBundles` parameter and passes it to `ssl.buildProperties(sslBundles)`. After the inner class `buildProperties()` methods drop their `SslBundles` parameter, this `with()` method must also be updated to remove the parameter and the corresponding argument — otherwise all `Consumer.buildProperties()`, `Producer.buildProperties()`, `Admin.buildProperties()`, and `Streams.buildProperties()` callers will fail to compile. This update is not visible in the provided diff (truncated at line ~444).
- [spring-boot-project/spring-boot-autoconfigure/src/main/java/org/springframework/boot/autoconfigure/kafka/KafkaProperties.java] The `Ssl.buildProperties()` method currently has a deprecated no-arg overload that delegates to `buildProperties(null)`. After removing `SslBundles` entirely, this deprecation layer should be cleaned up — the method should simply be `buildProperties()` without the deprecated delegating overload.
- [spring-boot-project/spring-boot-autoconfigure/src/main/java/org/springframework/boot/autoconfigure/kafka/KafkaProperties.java:41] After removing all `SslBundles` usage, the `import org.springframework.boot.ssl.SslBundles;` statement should also be removed (the diff shows this removal in KafkaProperties but verify it's propagated to all affected files).
v3:
SUMMARY:
This PR removes the deprecated SslBundles parameter from all build*Properties() methods in KafkaProperties and related inner classes. The change is safe from a broader codebase perspective since no callers outside the 4 changed files use the SslBundles overload, but the diff provided is incomplete and several call sites in the full base files still reference the removed overload.

POINTS:
- [spring-boot-project/spring-boot-autoconfigure/src/main/java/org/springframework/boot/autoconfigure/kafka/KafkaStreamsAnnotationDrivenConfiguration.java:65] The base content still shows `this.properties.buildStreamsProperties(null)` calling the now-removed overload. This must be updated to `buildStreamsProperties()` — no diff is provided for this file despite it being listed as changed.
- [spring-boot-project/spring-boot-autoconfigure/src/test/java/org/springframework/boot/autoconfigure/kafka/KafkaPropertiesTests.java:87] `sslBundleConfiguration()` calls `buildConsumerProperties(new DefaultSslBundleRegistry("myBundle", this.sslBundle))` which will not compile after removal. Same applies to tests at lines 105 (`sslPropertiesWhenKeyStoreLocationAndBundleSetShouldThrowException`), 111 (`sslPropertiesWhenKeyStoreKeyAndBundleSetShouldThrowException`), 117 (`sslPropertiesWhenTrustStoreLocationAndBundleSetShouldThrowException`), and 123 (`sslPropertiesWhenTrustStoreCertificatesAndBundleSetShouldThrowException`). These must be removed or rewritten to test bundle behavior through `SslBundles` integration rather than direct overload invocation.
- [spring-boot-project/spring-boot-autoconfigure/src/main/java/org/springframework/boot/autoconfigure/kafka/KafkaProperties.java:473] The diff is truncated mid-line in `Consumer.buildProperties()`. The full changes to inner class methods (`Consumer.buildProperties`, `Producer.buildProperties`, `Admin.buildProperties`, `Streams.buildProperties`) and the `Properties.with()` helper at line 1797 are not visible — all must have their `SslBundles` parameter removed for the code to compile.
- [spring-boot-project/spring-boot-autoconfigure/src/main/java/org/springframework/boot/autoconfigure/kafka/KafkaProperties.java:191] The PR title/description references only removing the deprecated `buildConsumerProperties(SslBundles)` method, but the actual scope is significantly broader — all `build*Properties(SslBundles)` overloads across Consumer, Producer, Admin, Streams, Ssl, and the Properties helper are being removed. The PR title and description should be updated to accurately reflect this full scope.
- [spring-boot-project/spring-boot-autoconfigure/src/main/java/org/springframework/boot/autoconfigure/kafka/KafkaProperties.java:1797] The `Properties.with(Ssl, Security, Map, SslBundles)` inner helper method at line 1797 still takes `SslBundles` in the base content. This signature must also be updated to remove the fourth parameter and call `ssl.buildProperties()` without arguments, otherwise inner class callers will have a compile-time mismatch.
- [spring-boot-project/spring-boot-autoconfigure/src/main/java/org/springframework/boot/autoconfigure/kafka/KafkaProperties.java:38] The import `org.springframework.boot.ssl.SslBundles` should be removed from the import list since it will no longer be referenced after all overload removals.
v4:
SUMMARY:
This PR removes the unused `SslBundles` parameter from `KafkaProperties.build*Properties()` methods. Investigation confirms the parameter was never actually consumed in `Ssl.buildProperties()` — it was passed through but never referenced. The change is correct in principle but has a critical missing update.

POINTS:
- [spring-boot-project/spring-boot-autoconfigure/src/main/java/org/springframework/boot/autoconfigure/kafka/KafkaStreamsAnnotationDrivenConfiguration.java:65] **COMPILATION ERROR RISK**: This file calls `this.properties.buildStreamsProperties(null)` but the diff shows no changes to this file. After removing the `buildStreamsProperties(SslBundles)` overload, this call will fail to compile. Must change to `this.properties.buildStreamsProperties()` to match the pattern applied in `KafkaAutoConfiguration.java:170`.

- [spring-boot-project/spring-boot-autoconfigure/src/main/java/org/springframework/boot/autoconfigure/kafka/KafkaProperties.java:1431] `Ssl.buildProperties(SslBundles)` method body never references the `sslBundles` parameter — confirmed dead code. Similarly, the `Properties.with(Ssl, Security, Map, SslBundles)` helper at line 1797 passes `sslBundles` to `ssl.buildProperties(sslBundles)` which ignores it entirely. Removal is safe.

- [spring-boot-project/spring-boot-autoconfigure/src/main/java/org/springframework/boot/autoconfigure/kafka/KafkaProperties.java:1429] The `@Deprecated(since = "3.2.0", forRemoval = true)` annotation on the no-arg `Ssl.buildProperties()` should be removed since the no-arg version becomes the only version after this PR. The deprecated no-arg delegator and the overloaded method should both be replaced by a single no-arg implementation.

- [spring-boot-project/spring-boot-autoconfigure/src/test/java/org/springframework/boot/autoconfigure/kafka/KafkaPropertiesTests.java:109,137,146,155,164] Five test methods pass `new DefaultSslBundleRegistry(...)` to `buildConsumerProperties(SslBundles)`. These tests must be updated — either remove the SslBundles argument or remove the tests entirely if they only validate the now-removed overload behavior. The PR description mentions "The removed test has been restored" but these 5 overloaded-method callers are not visible in the provided diff.

- [spring-boot-project/spring-boot-autoconfigure/src/main/java/org/springframework/boot/autoconfigure/kafka/KafkaProperties.java:38] Good removal of the unused `import org.springframework.boot.ssl.SslBundles;`. Note: `KafkaAutoConfiguration.java` retains its own `SslBundles` import (line 45) which is still needed for `PropertiesKafkaConnectionDetails` injection — correctly preserved.
